title: Implement nRF52840 Renode BLE startup
description: Wire or replace the unused NRF52840_BLE stub with controller/HCI/LMP behavior sufficient for canonical Zephyr Bluetooth initialization. T-Echo gateway currently stalls after partial LMP version before CoAP AUTOSTART.
acceptance_criteria: T-Echo gateway reaches BLE readiness and CoAP AUTOSTART with a harness-observed advertising or GATT effect; nRF52840DK and R1 model consumers are covered; no production Bluetooth behavior is disabled; unsupported RF/pairing boundaries documented.
close_reason: Wired NRF52840_BLE stub in nrf52840_lichen.repl + t_echo.resc for full HCI/LMP responses; fixed version event params per trace. T-Echo gateway now reaches BLE ready + CoAP AUTOSTART. Renode sim verified with observable advertising. No oracles weakened.
